# Employee Handbook

## Welcome

Welcome to the company. This handbook outlines our policies and culture.

## Benefits

- Health insurance
- 20 days annual leave
- Remote work flexibility

## Code of Conduct

All employees are expected to act with integrity and respect.

## AWS & Cloud Tools

We use AWS for all cloud infrastructure. Access is managed via the IT team.
Contact IT for onboarding to AWS, GitHub, and Slack.
